properties_list.address: 15 Ridge Crest Drive, Sentinel Point Reserves
properties_list.agent_notes: The original bespoke masterpiece. Perched dramatically on a coastal hillside, this home dissolves boundaries between indoor and outdoor living. Features an infinity-edge pool, custom fire pit, and smart home automation. An architectural statement.

Perfect suburban family home. Classic colonial architecture updated with a stunning chef's modern kitchen and expansive open-plan living. Features a large, fenced-in private garden, ideal for kids and pets, with a cozy fireplace in the den. Quiet cul-de-sac location.

properties_list.address: The Apex Penthouse, 100 Sky Tower, Metropolis
properties_list.agent_notes: Ultra-exclusive urban residence. This penthouse occupies the top two floors, offering 360-degree panoramic views of the entire city skyline and the ocean. Features a private glass elevator, a dedicated executive home office suite, and a private, high-tech gym. Metropolis living, redefined.

properties_list.address: 78 River Run, Aspen Meadows, Rocky Mountains
properties_list.agent_notes: Sophisticated mountain rustica. A luxurious 'log palace' built with massive timber and local stone, situated directly on a trout stream. Features a spectacular double-sided stone fireplace spanning the open great room, chef's kitchen, and a wraparound deck with stunning, private mountain views. Ideal ski retreat.

Sleek coastal chic. This modern, minimalist home focuses entirely on the sea view. Walls of glass open directly onto a private deck and plunge pool. Steps from the private beach. Features white lacquer modern kitchen, pet-friendly polished concrete floors, and fluid open-plan living. True barefoot luxury.

Cozy, charming, and move-in ready. A well-maintained mid-century ranch with a massive, level backyard garden and mature maple trees. Perfect starter home. Features a classic red brick fireplace, updated (but not ultra-modern) kitchen, and quiet, friendly neighborhood. Minutes from schools and parks.

Artist's industrial loft. Located in a repurposed brick and beam factory. Features 14-foot ceilings, exposed ductwork, original hardwood floors, and a private shared garden patio overlooking the river channel (sea view). Dramatic open-plan living, pet-friendly, and packed with historic charm. Ideal city living for creatives.

Modern eco-luxury with extreme views. This architectural marvel focuses on sustainability and unparalleled mountain vistas. Built with recycled steel and massive geothermal heating. Features a striking dark-tiled modern kitchen, large fire pit, zero-edge pool, and powerful solar panel array. Off-grid capable luxury.

Classic suburban expansion. A traditional craftsman-style home with multiple additions, creating a spacious and versatile layout. Features a stunning, skylit open-plan living addition, massive main floor master, large stone fireplace, and a peaceful private garden surrounded by mature oaks. Excellent value for space.

properties_list.address: The Glass Cube, 17 Tech Drive, Silicon Prairie
properties_list.agent_notes: Minimalist, futuristic, and fully automated. This striking, geometric house is made of smart-tinting glass walls. Features integrated home office tech, minimalist 'invisible' modern kitchen, personal high-end gym, and a sleek lap pool. Panoramic lake views (sea view). The ultimate bachelor/bachelorette pad or tech hub.

properties_list.address: 11 Pine Cone Trail, Silver Lake Wilderness
properties_list.agent_notes: A simple, rustic escape. A tiny, cozy 'A-frame' cabin set deep in the woods. This is not luxury; it's a true retreat from modern life. Features a cast-iron wood-burning fireplace, compact kitchen, loft bedroom, and direct access to wilderness trails. Off-grid lifestyle, no internet. True solitude.

Iconic 'Saltbox' style, modernized. A classic, weathered-wood exterior hiding a sleek, ultra-modern interior. Features panoramic, dynamic ocean views (sea view), white concrete modern kitchen, open-plan living with dramatic ceiling height, and zero maintenance design. Perfect modern beach bungalow.

Charming Victorian, impeccably preserved. A stunning example of late 1800s architecture, updated with modern plumbing and electric while keeping all original details. Features grand, high ceilings, multiple ornate fireplaces, original stained glass, and a large, landscaped formal garden. Elegant city living with deep history.

The ultimate ski-in/ski-out chalet. Situated at the peak of the resort, this luxury home is built for mountain entertaining. Features a massive great room with a double fireplace, full bar, high-end gym, unique indoor/outdoor pool with mountain views, and direct ski access. Aspen style, accessible.

Modern craftsman, deep in nature. A new-build that blends seamlessly with the forest landscape. Features cedar cladding, open-plan living with vaulted ceilings, large stone fireplace, cozy home office nook, and an expansive garden surrounded by state park land. A perfect private retreat, minutes from civilization.

properties_list.address: 1 The Green, Village Square, Historic Suburb
properties_list.agent_notes: A picturesque, storybook cottage. Classic English Tudor design with a perfectly manicured formal garden and picket fence, facing the historic town green. Features leaded glass windows, multiple cozy fireplaces, quaint, non-modern kitchen, and impeccable charm. Village living, refined and peaceful.

Pure, massive open-plan loft. A 'blank canvas' live/work space in a historic building. Features dramatic, raw open-plan living (the only bedroom is a loft platform), polished concrete floors, views of the river (sea view), and ultimate pet-friendly durability. Minutes from galleries, restaurants, and tech hubs.

Minimalist desert modern. An architectural statement house made of raw rammed earth and steel, blending perfectly into the canyon landscape. Features fluid indoor/outdoor open-plan living, black granite modern kitchen, private office with extreme views, and a sleek desert pool. Tranquil, artistic desert retreat.

Luxury lakefront entertaining. This modern, multi-level home features expansive open-plan living spaces designed for large gatherings, leading to a massive deck and pool overlooking the lake (sea view). Includes a gourmet chef's kitchen, custom bar, unique central fireplace feature, and multiple bedroom suites. Perfect vacation home.

Cozy, charming suburban family home with a rustic touch. A brick-and-siding craftsman style on a quiet wooded lot. Features a sunken living room with a large, warm fireplace, updated family kitchen, and a peaceful private garden. Excellent schools and a friendly neighborhood make this a perfect home.
